Login Try it for Free

Menu Management

Bring updates across delivery platforms instantly

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually.

Start for Free See a Demo

Powerful menu management, made simple

  • 🔄

    One update, everywhere

    Update your menu once on Foaps and it syncs instantly across Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and all other connected platforms.

  • 💰

    Bulk pricing updates

    Change prices for multiple items at once. Perfect for seasonal menus or promotional pricing.

  • 🚫

    Item availability control

    Mark items as unavailable instantly when you run out — customers won't order what you can't deliver.

  • 📷

    Image & description sync

    Update item images and descriptions across all platforms simultaneously.

  • 🗂️

    Category management

    Organize your menu into categories and reorder them easily for better customer experience.

  • 📅

    Scheduled menu changes

    Plan ahead — schedule menu changes like lunch specials or weekend-only items in advance.

How it works

Update once. Reflect everywhere.

Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone. The changes will be reflected across all food delivery platforms in no time.

Whether you're running a lunch special, updating seasonal items, or doing a full menu refresh — Foaps makes it instantaneous and painless.

Get Started Free

Stop updating menus manually on every platform

Let Foaps handle the sync while you focus on your food.

Start for Free
